content.question: What fraction of the observed increase in SEN/BTMN identification is attributable to diagnostic-tool modernization vs. policy-driven administrative change (mandatory school enrollment, school-readiness assessment tightening) vs. true underlying prevalence increases?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a retrospective decomposition analysis using administrative data (referral rates by age cohort pre/post 2018 and 2020 policy changes, diagnostic tool adoption dates, clinical vs. administrative classification records) to estimate counterfactual identification rates under each mechanism.
